note: jquery_ui_tooltip is a passive asset/library provider (no config UI, no permissions, no services, no config schema) that ships only an .info.yml; the tooltip library is registered by the jquery_ui base module's hook_library_info_alter(). All cases are `recipe` (response-graded), not `execution` (live-state). Facts are grounded in data.json, usage.md, agent/start.md and agent/theming/jquery_ui_tooltip.md.

evals.prompt: On a Drupal 11 site, why would I install the contrib `jquery_ui_tooltip` module? What does it actually provide?
evals.expected_output: It re-provides the single jQuery UI Tooltip widget as an attachable asset library after jQuery UI was deprecated and removed from Drupal core, so existing code that calls .tooltip() keeps working. It is not a feature/config module.

evals.prompt: In a Drupal 11 render array I need the jQuery UI tooltip widget. Give the exact `#attached` line to attach it.
What is the machine name of the library this module makes available to attach?
evals.expected_output: The attachable library id is jquery_ui_tooltip/tooltip (vendored jQuery UI 1.13.2 tooltip-min.js plus base-theme tooltip.css).

evals.prompt: Does jquery_ui_tooltip work on its own, or does it require another module?
evals.expected_output: It hard-depends on the jquery_ui base module (>=8.x-1.7 / drupal/jquery_ui ^1.7); the tooltip library's dependencies (jquery_ui/widget, jquery_ui/position and internal jquery_ui helpers) come from that module, so jquery_ui must be enabled.

evals.prompt: In my own module's *.libraries.yml, how do I make my JS library pull in the jQuery UI tooltip widget? Show the YAML.
evals.expected_output: Under your library's `dependencies:` list `- jquery_ui_tooltip/tooltip`; Drupal loads the widget JS/CSS and its jquery_ui dependency chain in order.

evals.prompt: Where is the configuration/settings page for jquery_ui_tooltip, and what permissions does it add?
evals.expected_output: There is none: jquery_ui_tooltip has no configuration UI, no permissions, no services and no config schema. You enable it and attach the jquery_ui_tooltip/tooltip library.

evals.prompt: This module ships only an .info.yml with no *.libraries.yml. So where does the `tooltip` library definition actually come from?
evals.expected_output: The jquery_ui base module's hook_library_info_alter() reads jquery_ui.libraries.data.json and registers the tooltip definition under this module's jquery_ui_tooltip namespace; jquery_ui_tooltip itself carries only an .info.yml.

evals.prompt: My legacy code references the old core `core/jquery.ui.tooltip` library and I get deprecation errors. What do I replace it with?
evals.expected_output: Replace core/jquery.ui.tooltip with jquery_ui_tooltip/tooltip (with the jquery_ui base module enabled).
